prompts: Cinematic anime realism, luxury cruise ballroom during a storm, chandelier swaying, polished floor reflections. Mira Vale, a masculine passenger in elegant evening wear with practical shoes, catches Rina Storme, a feminine ship doctor in a medical coat, as she slips on the wet floor. Supportive arm hold, alert expressions, no injury, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous ballroom shot. Rina Storme steadies her feet, looking up at Mira Vale with a nod of gratitude. Mira Vale gently releases the supportive hold, both standing balanced. Calm crowd in the background, storm lighting, no text, no watermark.
